final:
module RefModule(
    input D,
    input CLK,
    input RESET,
    input EN,
    output reg Q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or negedge RESET or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (~RESET) begin
            Q <= 0;
        end else if (EN) begin
            Q <= D;
        end
    end

endmodule
